claude_findings.p2_deferred_reason: Inherited duplicate forbidden-claim list entries are harmless because runtime uses a Set and the contract mirrors policy; defer to a future hygiene pack.

human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-013 closes RP00.P02.M05.S17 after final validation and commit, then hands off to RP00.P02.M05.S18 without claiming source micro-phase completion, rollback execution, retry execution, compensation execution, operator escalation writes, customer notifications, incident trace writes, observability events, blocked-output writes, approval/review writes, runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ execution, permission-engine or security-trimming execution, audit writes, database/storage/product-state persistence, service execution, runtime route creation, Claude runtime review, UI creation, or real data use.
